operational_knowledge_units.title: SystemDatabaseModel represents system state and current sort GUID
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that the SystemDatabaseModel shows the state of the system and the current sort guid.
observed_evidence: Slide title: 'Robotics Database / System Database Model'
Text: 'The SystemDatabaseModel shows the state of the system and the current sort guid.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Robotics Database System Database Model. The SystemDatabaseModel shows the state of the system and the current sort guid.

operational_knowledge_units.title: SystemDatabaseModel includes enumerated system states
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The SystemDatabaseModel includes a set of named system states visible on the slide.
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: SystemDatabaseModel state list includes StartingUp, StartUpRequested, Running, ShutDownRequested, Shutdown, ZoneConfigRequested, ZoneConfigStaging, CloseOutRequested, CloseOutStaging, and CloseOutStaged.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Operational lifecycle concepts reflected in SystemDatabaseModel states
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The state names indicate the model reflects startup, running, shutdown, zone configuration, and closeout lifecycle conditions for the system.
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: SystemDatabaseModel state names reflect operational lifecycle concepts including startup, running, shutdown, zone configuration, and closeout.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: No procedure extracted from System Database Model state list slide
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide presents a database model description and a list of system states, without stepwise user actions or explicit operational sequence.
warnings: Slide contains state and database reference information only.
No explicit reusable action sequence, UI interaction, or operator procedure is shown.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Discarded as procedure candidate because the slide is a database model/state reference: it describes that SystemDatabaseModel shows system state and current sort guid and lists states, but provides no explicit action steps.
